top3.sql:
WITH monthly_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        strftime('%Y-%m', txn_date) AS month,
        SUM(txn_amount) AS total_balance
    FROM customer_transactions
    GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', txn_date)
),
previous_month_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        m1.month AS current_month,
        COALESCE(m2.total_balance, 0) AS prev_month_balance
    FROM monthly_balances m1
    LEFT JOIN monthly_balances m2 
        ON m2.month = (
            SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', date(m1.month || '-01', '-1 month'))
 ...

WITH monthly_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        strftime('%Y-%m', txn_date) AS month,
        SUM(txn_amount) AS total_balance
    FROM customer_transactions
    GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', txn_date)
),
monthly_balances_with_prev AS (
    SELECT 
        month,
        total_balance,
        LAG(total_balance, 1) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS prev_month_balance
    FROM monthly_balances
)
SELECT 
    month,
    MAX(0, prev_month_balance) AS prev_month_balance_non_negative
FROM monthly_balances_with_pre...

    FROM customer_transactions
    GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', txn_date)
),

    SELECT 
        month,
        total_balance,
        LAG(total_balance, 1) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS prev_month_balance

WITH monthly_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        substr(txn_date, 1, 7) AS month,
        SUM(txn_amount) AS total_balance
    FROM customer_transactions
    GROUP BY substr(txn_date, 1, 7)
),
monthly_balances_lagged AS (
    SELECT 
        month,
        total_balance,
        LAG(total_balance, 1) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS prev_month_balance
    FROM monthly_balances
)
SELECT 
    month,
    CASE WHEN prev_month_balance < 0 THEN 0 ELSE prev_month_balance END AS prev_month_balance_non_negative
FR...
